title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Forever 21 India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Forever 21 India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India South Asia Partners:
Forever 21 India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India South Asia Partners!
